title: Thruster relay
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''thruster relay''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] component.

[[Watto/Legends|Watto]] needed one to repair a podracer [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] destroyed during a [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I: Anakin Skywalker]]''

[[Category:Podracer components]]
